Class Context

java.lang.Object
Controller.Context
public class Context extends Object
The Context class represents the current state of the game, including players, resources, and actions. It is used to manage the game flow and provide information to the controller. It works as the dynamic variant of the card that can change based on the current game situation. This class is serializable to allow saving and restoring game states.

  • Field Details

    • controller

      private Controller controller

    • players

      private List<Player> players
      List of players in the game. This list is initialized from the controller's flight board turn order.

    • specialPlayers

      private List<Player> specialPlayers
      List of some players depending on the Card. This list is initialized as empty and can be modified during the game.

    • crewmates

      private int crewmates
      Represents the number of crewmates, power, required goods, and other resources. These values are initialized based on the specific card being played.

    • power

      private int power

    • requiredGoods

      private int requiredGoods

    • defaultAmount

      private int defaultAmount
      Represents the default amount of resources, such as goods or crewmates, that can be used in various game scenarios, usually for enemies.

    • goods

      private List<Good> goods

    • projectiles

      private List<Projectile> projectiles

    • planets

      private List<Planet> planets

    • credits

      private int credits

    • daysLost

      private int daysLost

    • diceNumber

      private int diceNumber

    • visual

      private Runnable visual

    • render

      private List<String> render
      List of strings to render the visual representation of the context. This is used to display information about the current game state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller)
      Constructs a Context with the given controller, unique for each card. Initializes the players list from the controller's flight board turn order.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, AbandonedShip card)
      Constructs a Context for the AbandonedShip card. Initializes crewmates, credits, daysLost, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the AbandonedShip card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, AbandonedStation card)
      Constructs a Context for the AbandonedStation card. Initializes crewmates, goods, daysLost, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the AbandonedStation card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, MeteorSwarm card)
      Constructs a Context for the MeteorSwarm card. Initializes projectiles, diceNumber, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the AsteroidField card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, OpenSpace card)
      Constructs a Context for the OpenSpace card. Initializes visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the OpenSpace card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, Pirates card)
      Constructs a Context for the Pirates card. Initializes credits, daysLost, projectiles, power, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the Pirates card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, Planets card)
      Constructs a Context for the Planets card. Initializes planets, daysLost, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the Planets card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, Slavers card)
      Constructs a Context for the Slavers card. Initializes credits, daysLost, crewmates, power, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the Slavers card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, Smugglers card)
      Constructs a Context for the Smugglers card. Initializes goods, daysLost, power, requiredGoods, and visual representation.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the Smugglers card being played

    • Context

      public Context(Controller controller, CombatZone card) throws InvalidParameters
      Constructs a Context for the CombatZone card. Initializes daysLost, crewmates, projectiles, and visual representation based on the card level.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller managing the game
      card - the CombatZone card being played
      Throws:
      InvalidParameters - if the card level is invalid
